claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --allowedTools "Read Grep Bash(git diff -- *) Bash(git diff --stat -- *) Bash(git status --short)" --output-format json

findings.title: No dedicated negative test for audit_hint_precheck_denied fail-closed reason
Redundant unreachable decision guard in precheckControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffPrimaryHappyPath
findings.evidence: After assertControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffAuditHintPrecheckResult(auditHintResult), service.js re-checks audit_hint_decision and audit_event_ref_satisfied even though the S06 result validator already enforces them.
findings.recommended_action: No action required; this is intentional defense-in-depth and follows S05/S06 precedent.

findings.title: No dedicated negative test for audit_hint_precheck_denied fail-closed reason
findings.evidence: The fail_closed_on list includes audit_hint_precheck_denied, while tests cover the case transitively because S06 cannot emit a denied result and tampered S06 results are rejected by the carried S06 assert.
findings.recommended_action: No action required for closeout; optional future documentation-only explicit rejection case.

review_summary: S07 correctly consumes the real S06 audit-hint precheck result, emits a frozen synthetic metadata-only receipt, carries S02-S06 and M00 refs plus handoff_context_ids and acceptance_gate_ids, supports firm-level null Matter context, fails closed on missing/wrong/denied S06 input and forbidden or unknown happy-path claims, and preserves no-real-data/no-write/no-runtime/no-audit-write/no-handoff-draft boundaries. No P0/P1/P2 and no production_ready risk.
